name: Campaign Test — Real Shopper
author: Zhi
description: Prototype for the real-shopper campaign testing feature. Shows how the Test panel evolves from a hardcoded mock to a real shopper pulled from the target audience — with context level badge, expanded reasoning (Shopify profile + context used + context absent), and a 'Try another shopper' cycle across high / medium / no-context archetypes.

name: Continue Conversation on Chat
author: Zhi
description: Aspire Nutrition shopper experience prototype illustrating AI Journey SMS → on-site Shopping Assistant continuity. Four-act flow: browse abandonment SMS → two-way conversation → on-site chat auto-opens hydrated with full SMS history → in-chat conversion with discount honored. Companion to the Demo April board storyboard (which shows the reverse direction).

name: SMS Consent Collection
author: Zhi
description: Stand-in mockup for the SMS consent collection v0 spec. Shows Subscribers nav inserted into AI Journey with three tabs: sign-up forms, subscriber list, audit log. Demonstrates AI-generated TCPA/CASL disclosure with edit-and-version-track flow.

name: Aspire Nutrition RCS Demo
author: Zhi
description: Interactive RCS messaging prototype with Rich Cards, Carousels, Video Cards, and Maps. Three scenarios: Cart Abandonment, Post-Purchase, New Product Launch.

name: Brand Tone of Voice
author: Zhi
description: Mockup exploring how brand tone of voice can be configured and previewed.

name: RCS Templates Visual Guide
author: Zhi
description: Visual guide showcasing RCS template patterns and components.
